More Success Stories

More Success Stories

More Success Stories

  • Hi, I am Prachi. I joined Tharun‚??s Not Just a Video Editing Cohort (Cohort 3). Before this, I was just exploring design with no clear direction. But after joining the cohort, I not only learned Premiere Pro and After Effects from scratch but also understood how to find clients, pitch confidently, and actually earn from my skills. In fact, just a few months after the cohort, I worked with a foreign client and got paid $800 for a single video. That moment changed everything. I realised this course didn‚??t just make me better at editing, it made me believe that I can actually build a creative career while still in college. If you‚??re even slightly thinking about joining, trust me, do it. It‚??s a decision you‚??ll look back on as the start of your new life.

    Prachi

    Before joining Cohort 3, I used to edit on Kinemaster and VN because I was too scared to open Premiere Pro. But within a few weeks, I started editing confidently for both short and long-form videos. The live classes, mentors, and community were the best part. They guided me at every step, and I made great friends who still help me even after 2 years of the cohort whenever I‚??m stuck. After the cohort, I built my portfolio, got the chance to work with Aakash Majumder, and now I‚??m a Senior Editor at YAAS, earning really well doing what I love. If you‚??re a student who wants to start freelancing or grow in content creation, just go for it. This cohort is worth every single penny.

    Srinjoy

    When I joined this cohort, I just wanted to learn editing as a hobby. I knew nothing about editing before I just found it cool, so I joined the cohort, and then I took part in the 21-day challenge. It changed everything for me. I gained 20k followers from that challenge in just 21 days, built a personal brand and started getting brand deals and earning money from video editing, and also got the opportunity to work with one of my favourite creators, Tharun Speaks. This cohort is literally insane, it doesn‚??t just teach you how to edit the best videos, but will help you grow in social media and build your personal brand.

    Dhruvil Patel

    Hey guys, I am Padmesh, 19 years old, and currently studying in the UK. I am a student of Tharun‚??s first cohort, and it was a game-changer for me. I went from a beginner to a pro at Premiere Pro and got the chance to work with Tharun Speaks and have made 3-4 lakhs within 10 months of learning editing. While others are going to college and trying to find a side hustle, I was earning a good amount of money as a content creator and video editor in the UK, along with my studies, as they pay really well here. All thanks to Tharun bhaiya, Neeraj bhaiya and the entire cohort. It was the best experience being a part of the 1st cohort of this amazing ‚??Not Just A Video Editing Cohort‚?ù. So if you are someone who wants to join this cohort, just do it, coz you never know what‚??s waiting for you.

    Padmesh

    Enrolling in Tharun Speaks Video Editing Cohort was one of my best decisions. Within a month, I got an internship at The Boring Edit, later joined Unacademy, and now I‚??m working at an AI startup. This cohort teaches way beyond editing they teach storytelling, freelancing, content creation,and everything you actually need to grow. If you‚??re serious about your career, this Cohort is the one. The best you can choose.

    Deepak Divakar

    Hello everyone, I am Rohan, 20 years old from Jharkhand. I joined Cohort 3 while studying in college and ended up mentoring in Cohort 4. The community here is amazing, and people genuinely support you. I even got my first freelance client through it! A special shoutout to Vishi, our senior mentor!! I am even paying my own college fees through freelancing. I believe that this is not just a place to learn video editing, but you‚??ll also grow as a person, as I have grown through mentoring people. So if you're thinking about joining this cohort, just go for it, and you'll not regret it.

    Rohan

    Hey guys, I am Akash, and I was in my 3rd year of college when I joined ‚??Not Just A Video Editing Cohort 2‚?ù, and honestly, it changed everything for me. Within a few months, I started earning ‚?π50‚??60K a month from editing, which was unreal for me, being a student. I took part and won in the ‚??21-day challenge‚?ù, which gave me millions of views and boosted my personal brand like crazy. What I love the most is that it‚??s not just about editing but also how to write killer scripts, master storytelling, freelancing, building your brand, and even how to build an agency. I‚??m super grateful to Tharun and his team for all their support!

    Akash

    Before joining Cohort 1, I used to deliver newspapers early in the morning just to support my family. I never thought video editing could change my life, but it did. After the cohort, Tharun noticed my work and offered me a chance to work with him. I moved to Bangalore, joined Vedantu as a video editor earning ‚?π50K a month, and now I‚??m part of Tharun Speaks‚?? core team, earning more than an average IITAN, supporting my family proudly. This course didn‚??t just teach me editing; it gave me a career and confidence I never had. You won‚??t find a better course at this price, and if you‚??re serious about changing your life, this is where it starts.

    Aashif Raza

    Hey everyone, I am Satwik. Before joining Cohort 3, I was just an average 2nd-year B.Tech student with no idea how to start freelancing. Now I earn ‚?π40K a month doing video editing. And not just editing, this cohort taught me how to talk to clients, negotiate, and close deals. The mentors and community genuinely help you grow. If you‚??re serious about building your career, this course is worth every bit.

    Satwik

    I joined Cohort 1 with zero direction in life, and it completely changed my life. After the cohort, I mastered editing, left college, and moved to Bangalore to join Tharun Speaks‚?? team. Since then, I‚??ve been earning in lakhs and also started an Instagram page ‚??indian video school‚?ù and grew it to 50k in just 70 days. This cohort didn‚??t just teach me editing; it gave me the confidence to turn my passion into a full-time career. If you‚??re thinking about it, just go for it. It's genuinely life-changing.

    Vishal Dake
